name: elocin
description: Industry-agnostic observation tracking platform (education-first UI). Organization → Location → Team → People → Observations.

scripts.migrate: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/001_core.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/003_auth.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/004_parent_invite_hints.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/005_indexes.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/006_behavioral_and_milestones.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/007_staff_invites.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/008_lexicon_misses.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/009_observation_revisions.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/010_interpretations.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/011_current_interpretation_view.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/012_analytics_events.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/013_intervention_linkage.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/014_student_classroom_fields.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/016_password_reset.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/017_email_verification.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f migrations/002_seed.sql && node --env-file=.env scripts/backfill_interpretations.mjs
scripts.migrate:prod: for f in 001_core 003_auth 004_parent_invite_hints 005_indexes 006_behavioral_and_milestones 007_staff_invites 008_lexicon_misses 009_observation_revisions 010_interpretations 011_current_interpretation_view 012_analytics_events 013_intervention_linkage 014_student_classroom_fields 016_password_reset 017_email_verification; do psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f "migrations/$f.sql" || exit 1; done
